overview.definition: Zero Knowledge Proof (ZKP) is a cryptographic method that allows one party to prove to another that a statement is true without revealing any information beyond the validity of the statement itself.
overview.core_principle: Prove something is true without revealing the data itself
overview.importance: Game-changing technology for privacy, security, and scalability in financial systems

privacy_without_hiding.description: Maintain complete privacy while still proving compliance and legitimacy
privacy_without_hiding.use_case: Users can prove they have sufficient funds without revealing their exact balance

trust_without_exposure.description: Build trust between parties without exposing sensitive information
trust_without_exposure.use_case: Verify identity without sharing personal documents or data

validation_without_data_leaks.description: Validate transactions and compliance without exposing transaction details
validation_without_data_leaks.use_case: Prove transaction legitimacy to regulators without revealing customer data

private_payments.description: Enable completely private financial transactions while maintaining compliance

secure_digital_identity.description: Prove identity attributes without revealing underlying personal data
benefits: Income verification without showing exact salary
Address verification without exposing full address
mavenpay_use_cases: KYC compliance without storing sensitive data
BVN verification without exposing BVN number
Credit scoring without revealing transaction history
Account tier verification without balance disclosure

transparent_voting.description: Enable verifiable voting systems with complete privacy

scalable_blockchains.description: Dramatically increase transaction throughput while maintaining security

zk_snarks.name: Zero-Knowledge Succinct Non-Interactive Argument of Knowledge
zk_snarks.description: Most popular ZKP protocol, used by Zcash and zkSync
zk_snarks.mavenpay_fit: Excellent for private transactions and balance proofs

zk_starks.name: Zero-Knowledge Scalable Transparent Argument of Knowledge
zk_starks.mavenpay_fit: Good for compliance proofs and auditing

snarkjs.use_case: Client-side proof generation in mobile app

for_mavenpay.impact: Reduced data breach risk, lower insurance costs
Meet CBN/NDPR requirements while protecting user privacy
for_mavenpay.target_market: All users, especially in regulated industries

for_mavenpay.impact: Build user trust without collecting excessive data
Handle more transactions with lower costs

simple_explanations.what_is_zkp: Imagine proving you're over 18 without showing your ID. That's Zero Knowledge Proof - proving something is true without revealing the details.
simple_explanations.why_it_matters: Your financial privacy is protected. You can prove you have enough money to make a payment without showing your exact balance to anyone.
simple_explanations.how_it_helps: With ZK technology, SznPay can verify your transactions are legitimate without seeing your private financial information.
simple_explanations.real_world_example: Like showing a bouncer you're old enough to enter a club by showing just your face, not your entire ID with your address, birthdate, and other details.

user_benefits: Your identity is verified without sharing documents

faqs.question: Is Zero Knowledge Proof secure?
faqs.answer: Yes! ZKP is based on advanced cryptography and is mathematically proven to be secure. It's used by major blockchain projects and financial institutions worldwide.

faqs.question: Will my transactions be slower with ZK?
faqs.answer: No, actually faster! ZK technology can process thousands of transactions per second, making your payments quicker than traditional methods.

faqs.question: Can the government still verify my transactions for compliance?
faqs.answer: Yes! ZK allows you to prove compliance without revealing private details. Regulators can verify legitimacy without seeing your personal financial data.

faqs.question: Is this the same as cryptocurrency?
faqs.answer: Not exactly. While ZK is used in some cryptocurrencies, it's a privacy technology that works with regular money (Naira, Dollars) too. SznPay uses ZK for privacy, not for crypto trading.

cbn_compliance.challenge: CBN requires transaction monitoring for AML/CFT
cbn_compliance.zkp_solution: Provide compliance proofs to CBN without exposing customer data
cbn_compliance.implementation: Generate ZK proofs that transactions meet AML thresholds without revealing amounts or parties
cbn_compliance.benefit: Satisfy regulatory requirements while protecting user privacy

ndpr_compliance.challenge: NDPR requires minimal data collection and storage
ndpr_compliance.zkp_solution: Verify identity and credentials without storing sensitive documents
ndpr_compliance.implementation: Use ZK credentials for KYC, store only proof of verification, not actual documents
ndpr_compliance.benefit: Reduced data breach liability, full NDPR compliance

aml_kyc.challenge: Know Your Customer requirements vs user privacy
aml_kyc.zkp_solution: Selective disclosure - prove identity attributes without full data exposure
aml_kyc.implementation: ZK-based identity verification that proves compliance without storing PII
aml_kyc.benefit: Balance regulatory compliance with user privacy rights

research_phase: Identify high-impact use cases for SznPay

pilot_launch: Launch private transactions for beta users

full_rollout: Enable ZK privacy for all users

when_user_asks_about_privacy.response:
🔐 SznPay uses Zero Knowledge Proof technology to protect your privacy!

With ZK technology, you can:
• Make private transactions without exposing amounts
• Prove you have sufficient funds without revealing your balance
• Verify your identity without sharing documents
• Stay compliant with regulations while protecting your data

Your financial privacy is our priority. Would you like to learn more about our privacy features?

when_user_asks_about_zkp.response:
🧠 Zero Knowledge Proof (ZKP) is revolutionary privacy technology!

Think of it like this: You can prove you're over 18 without showing your ID. That's Zero Knowledge - proving something is true without revealing the details.

For SznPay, this means:
✅ Private payments - amounts stay confidential
✅ Secure identity - verify without sharing documents
✅ Trust without exposure - prove legitimacy privately
✅ Faster transactions - better scalability

Want to enable ZK privacy features on your account?

when_user_asks_about_security.response:
🛡️ SznPay uses cutting-edge Zero Knowledge Proof technology for maximum security!

Unlike traditional banks that store all your data, we use ZK to:
• Verify your identity without storing sensitive documents
• Process transactions without seeing your balance
• Prove compliance without exposing your data
• Reduce data breach risk dramatically

With ZK, even if someone hacks our servers, your private financial information stays safe because we never store it in the first place!

Your security is built into our infrastructure, not just added on top.
